description: Edit-existing: fix an off-by-one bug in moving_average.

dispatch.task: The function `moving_average(values, window)` in the target file has a bug — it skips the last window-sized slice. Fix it so it returns one value per valid window over the input list. Verify by running the included tests.
constraints: Preserve the function signature `moving_average(values: list[float], window: int) -> list[float]`
Return float values; round each to 4 decimal places
Raise ValueError if window <= 0 or window > len(values)
